en: Now when the king lived in his house and the LORD had given him rest from all his surrounding enemies,
zh: 那時，王住在自己的宮中，耶和華使他安享太平，不受周圍仇敵的侵擾。

en: the king said to Nathan the prophet, "See now, I dwell in a house of cedar, but the ark of God dwells in a tent."
zh: 王對拿單先知說：“你看！我自己住在香柏木的宮裡，耶和華的約櫃卻停在帳幕內。”

en: And Nathan said to the king, "Go, do all that is in your heart, for the LORD is with you."
zh: 拿單對王說：“你可以照著你心所想的一切去作，因為耶和華與你同在。”

en: But that same night the word of the LORD came to Nathan,
zh: 那天晚上，耶和華的話臨到拿單說：

en: "Go and tell my servant David, 'Thus says the LORD: Would you build me a house to dwell in?
zh: “你去對我的僕人大衛說：耶和華這樣說：‘你要建造一座殿宇給我居住嗎？

en: I have not lived in a house since the day I brought up the people of Israel from Egypt to this day, but I have been moving about in a tent for my dwelling.
zh: 因為自從我把以色列人從埃及帶上來的那天起，直到今日，我都沒有住過殿宇。我一直都住在帳棚和會幕裡，到處漂泊。

en: In all places where I have moved with all the people of Israel, did I speak a word with any of the judges of Israel, whom I commanded to shepherd my people Israel, saying, "Why have you not built me a house of cedar?"'
zh: 我與以色列眾人一起走過的地方，我可曾對以色列的一個支派的官長，就是我所吩咐要牧養我子民以色列的，說：你們為甚麼不給我建造一座香柏木的殿宇呢？’

en: Now, therefore, thus you shall say to my servant David, 'Thus says the LORD of hosts, I took you from the pasture, from following the sheep, that you should be prince over my people Israel.
zh: 現在你要對我的僕人大衛這樣說：‘萬軍之耶和華這樣說：我把你從牧場中、從照顧羊群的工作中揀選出來，使你作我子民以色列的領袖，

en: And I have been with you wherever you went and have cut off all your enemies from before you. And I will make for you a great name, like the name of the great ones of the earth.
zh: 你無論到哪裡去，我都與你同在；我必在你面前剪除你所有的仇敵。我要使你得享大名，像世上那些偉人的名一樣。

en: And I will appoint a place for my people Israel and will plant them, so that they may dwell in their own place and be disturbed no more. And violent men shall afflict them no more, as formerly,
zh: 我要為我的子民以色列選定一個地方，栽培他們，使他們住自己的地方，不再受騷擾；惡人也不能再像以前那樣苦待他們，

en: from the time that I appointed judges over my people Israel. And I will give you rest from all your enemies. Moreover, the LORD declares to you that the LORD will make you a house.
zh: 像我立了士師治理我的子民以色列的那天以來那樣。我要使你安享太平，不受你所有的仇敵侵擾。耶和華向你宣告，耶和華要親自為你建立一個朝代。

en: When your days are fulfilled and you lie down with your fathers, I will raise up your offspring after you, who shall come from your body, and I will establish his kingdom.
zh: 到了你的壽數滿足，你與你的列祖一起長眠的時候，我必興起你親生的後裔接替你，並且我要堅固他的國。

en: He shall build a house for my name, and I will establish the throne of his kingdom forever.
zh: 他必為我的名建造一座殿宇，我要永遠堅固他的國位。

en: I will be to him a father, and he shall be to me a son. When he commits iniquity, I will discipline him with the rod of men, with the stripes of the sons of men,
zh: 我要作他的父親，他要作我的兒子，他若是犯了罪，我要用人的刑杖、用世人的鞭子糾正他。

en: but my steadfast love will not depart from him, as I took it from Saul, whom I put away from before you.
zh: 但我的慈愛必不離開他，像離開在你面前的掃羅一樣。

en: And your house and your kingdom shall be made sure forever before me. Your throne shall be established forever.'"
zh: 你的家和你的王國，也必在我 的面前永遠堅定，你的王位也必永遠堅立。’”

en: In accordance with all these words, and in accordance with all this vision, Nathan spoke to David.
zh: 拿單按著這一切話，又照著全部的默示，都對大衛說了。

en: Then King David went in and sat before the LORD and said, "Who am I, O Lord GOD, and what is my house, that you have brought me thus far?
zh: 於是，大衛王進去，坐在耶和華面前，說：“主耶和華啊！我是誰，我的家又算甚麼，你竟帶領我到這地步？

en: And yet this was a small thing in your eyes, O Lord GOD. You have spoken also of your servant's house for a great while to come, and this is instruction for mankind, O Lord GOD!
zh: 主耶和華啊，這在你眼中還看為小事，你也說到你僕人的家未來的事。主耶和華啊，這豈是人常遇到的事嗎？

en: And what more can David say to you? For you know your servant, O Lord GOD!
zh: 主耶和華啊，你認識你的僕人，大衛還有甚麼話可以對你說呢？

en: Because of your promise, and according to your own heart, you have brought about all this greatness, to make your servant know it.
zh: 你因自己應許的緣故，又按照自己的心意，行了這大事，為要使你僕人明白。

en: Therefore you are great, O LORD God. For there is none like you, and there is no God besides you, according to all that we have heard with our ears.
zh: 主耶和華啊，因此，你是偉大的！按照我們耳朵所聽見的，沒有像你的，除了你以外，再沒有別的 神。

en: And who is like your people Israel, the one nation on earth whom God went to redeem to be his people, making himself a name and doing for them great and awesome things by driving out before your people, whom you redeemed for yourself from Egypt, a nation and its gods?
zh: 世上有哪一個國家像你的子民以色列呢？ 神曾親自救贖他們，使他們作自己的子民，又為他自己立名，為他們 作了大事，為你的地作了可畏的事；在你的子民面前，就是你從埃及救贖出來歸你自己的子民面前，趕出了列國的人和他們的神。

en: And you established for yourself your people Israel to be your people forever. And you, O LORD, became their God.
zh: 你為自己堅立了你的子民以色列，使他們永遠作你的子民；耶和華啊，你也作了他們的 神。

en: And now, O LORD God, confirm forever the word that you have spoken concerning your servant and concerning his house, and do as you have spoken.
zh: 耶和華 神啊！你所應許關於你僕人和他的家的話，現在求你永遠堅守，並且照著你所說的去行吧；

en: And your name will be magnified forever, saying, 'The LORD of hosts is God over Israel,' and the house of your servant David will be established before you.
zh: 這樣，你的名必永遠為大，以致人要說：‘萬軍之耶和華是以色列的 神。’你僕人大衛的家也必在你面前得堅立。

en: For you, O LORD of hosts, the God of Israel, have made this revelation to your servant, saying, 'I will build you a house.' Therefore your servant has found courage to pray this prayer to you.
zh: 萬軍之耶和華以色列的 神啊！因為你曾啟示你的僕人說：‘我要為你建立家室。’所以你的僕人才敢來向你作這樣的禱告。

en: And now, O Lord GOD, you are God, and your words are true, and you have promised this good thing to your servant.
zh: 主耶和華啊！你是 神；你的話是真實可信的。你向你僕人應許了這美好的福分。

en: Now therefore may it please you to bless the house of your servant, so that it may continue forever before you. For you, O Lord GOD, have spoken, and with your blessing shall the house of your servant be blessed forever."
zh: 現在求你樂意賜福給你僕人的家，使它在你面前可以永遠存在。主耶和華啊！因為你曾經這樣應許，願你僕人的家因你的賜福永遠蒙福。”
